mapper.sql: link_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, subject_id, execution_package_id, rule_id, rule_configuration_hash, paper_ballot_template_attachment_id, paper_ballot_template_hash, collection_mode, status, result, prepared_by_user_id, prepared_at, opened_by_user_id, opened_at, settled_by_user_id, settled_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_project_voting ( project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, subject_id, execution_package_id, rule_id, rule_configuration_hash, paper_ballot_template_attachment_id, paper_ballot_template_hash, collection_mode, status, prepared_by_user_id, prepared_at, version ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{subjectId}, #{executionPackageId}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleConfigurationHash}, #{paperBallotTemplateAttachmentId}, #{paperBallotTemplateHash}, #{collectionMode}, #{status}, #{preparedByUserId}, #{preparedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_project_voting WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT link.link_id, link.project_id, link.plan_id, link.tenant_id, link.subject_id, link.execution_package_id, link.rule_id, link.rule_configuration_hash, link.paper_ballot_template_attachment_id, link.paper_ballot_template_hash, link.collection_mode, link.status, link.result, link.prepared_by_user_id, link.prepared_at, link.opened_by_user_id, link.opened_at, link.settled_by_user_id, link.settled_at, link.version FROM t_repair_project_voting link JOIN t_voting_execution_package package ON package.package_id = link.execution_package_id AND package.tenant_id = link.tenant_id JOIN t_voting_subject subject ON subject.subject_id = link.subject_id AND subject.tenant_id = link.tenant_id WHERE link.status = 'PREPARED' AND package.business_type = 'REPAIR_PROJECT' AND package.status = 'FROZEN' AND package.vote_start_at <= #{now} AND package.vote_end_at > #{now} AND subject.status = 2 AND subject.clock_suspended_at IS NULL ORDER BY package.vote_start_at, link.link_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT link.project_id, link.plan_id, project.project_no, project.project_name, link.subject_id, link.execution_package_id, electorate.representative_opid AS opid, electorate.room_id, roster.building_name, roster.unit_name, roster.room_name, link.collection_mode, link.status, link.result, package.package_hash, package.vote_start_at, package.vote_end_at FROM t_repair_project_voting link JOIN t_repair_project project ON project.project_id = link.project_id AND project.tenant_id = link.tenant_id JOIN t_voting_execution_package package ON package.package_id = link.execution_package_id AND package.tenant_id = link.tenant_id JOIN t_voting_electorate_item_snapshot electorate ON electorate.snapshot_id = package.electorate_snapshot_id AND electorate.representative_uid = #{ownerUid} JOIN c_property_roster roster ON roster.roster_id = electorate.roster_id WHERE link.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND link.status <> 'VOIDED' ORDER BY package.vote_start_at DESC, link.link_id DESC, electorate.room_id
